assignments.description: a flag in opp VR, to make sure the flow will complete regarding of the VR
assignments.name: Assign_VR_flag
assignments.label: Assign VR flag

assignments.description: a flag in opp VR, to make sure the flow will complete regarding of the VR
assignments.name: Assign_VR_flag_Update_Stage
assignments.label: Assign VR flag

rules.name: Yes_Cycle_Price_is_0
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 OR 2) AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 and not 6 ) OR ((1 OR 2) and 5 and 6 and 7)
rules.label: Yes, Cycle Price is 0

rules.name: Bypass_Meddpicc_Annual_Price_Increase_Is_Only_Product
rules.label: Bypass Meddpicc - Annual Price Increase Is Only Product

decisions.description: MIS-7523 Lean MEDDPICC: create a new screen for mandatory fields
decisions.name: Stage_Needs_To_Update
decisions.label: Stage Needs To Update

Flow.description: MIS-7979 - Removed AI Feedback fields MIS-7964 close lost stations visibility + annual price increase +stage updated screen MIS-8191 - cycle price check conditions MIS-8118 - Moved Cycle Price validation to Initial Discovery stage, Added UpdatedByNextStageFlow flag Added Probability saving MIS-7854 - Added cycle price validation MIS-7769 - Added 0$ to visibility conditions MIS-7853 Lean MEDDPICC: Recommended Close Date - Move to external flow and add a daily update MIS-7724 Recommended Close Date shows wrong values MIS-7609 - remove product sold, next stage validations MIS-7646 - Updated AI Fields Display MIS-7392 dynamic recommended close date MIS-7523 create a new screen for stage mandatory fields MIS-7463 Make MEDDPICC summary tab editable MIS-7525 Show all = true when Update_Stage_On_Opportunity = false MIS-7382 Added MEDDPICC AI MIS-7379 Make lookup fields optional on meddpicc flow MIS-7327 meddpicc nxct stage Recommended Close Date adjustment MIS-7311 Exclude mandatory fields from closed lost on 10% MIS-6998

formulas.description: Does the Champion have the influence to drive the deal internally?
formulas.name: Assignment_Champion1

formulas.description: Is the Champion actively advocating for your solution to other stakeholders?
formulas.name: Assignment_Champion2

formulas.description: Are your solution’s capabilities aligned with the customer's decision criteria? Did you influence or shape the decision criteria to your advantage?
formulas.name: Assignment_DC1

formulas.description: Did you successfully demonstrate a positive ROI for our solution?
formulas.name: Assignment_DC2

formulas.description: Have you identified all key stakeholders in the decision process?
formulas.name: Assignment_DP1

formulas.description: Have you identified the steps and timeline involved in the customer's decision-making process?
formulas.name: Assignment_DP2

formulas.description: Have you identified the person who has the ultimate decision-making authority and budget ownership?
formulas.name: Assignment_Economic_Buyer1

formulas.description: Has the Economic Buyer expressed interest or alignment with your solution?
formulas.name: Assignment_Economic_Buyer2

formulas.description: Have you identified the customer’s critical business challenges or pains?
formulas.name: Assignment_Identify_Pain1

formulas.description: Has the customer acknowledged the urgency to address these challenges?
formulas.name: Assignment_Identify_Pain2

formulas.description: Do you know the financial or operational impact of these challenges?
formulas.name: Assignment_Identify_Pain3

formulas.description: Do you know the measurable metrics the customer uses to determine success?
formulas.name: Assignment_Metrics1

formulas.description: Have you identified how achieving these metrics will impact the customer’s business performance?
formulas.name: Assignment_Metrics2

formulas.description: Do we have a verbal agreement to close the deal? Have we resolved all roadblocks and ensured that there are no significant obstacles that could hinder us?
formulas.name: Assignment_paper1

formulas.description: Was procurement & legal introduced to the process? Did we send quote and contract?
formulas.name: Assignment_Paper2

formulas.description:
{!Summary_Recommended_Close_Date} matches the actual date stored in medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c on the Opportunity.
Problem: The field {!Summary_Recommended_Close_Date} contains a long text string in a fixed format, for example:
Your current close date is 2025-08-21 The recommended close date is 2025-08-21 or later 🟩
Since the date appears inside plain text, it cannot be directly compared with a Date field.
Solution:
Use FIND to locate the starting position of the phrase "Your current close date is ".
Use MID to extract the next 10 characters → the date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Use DATEVALUE to convert this string into a valid Date value.
Compare it against the Opportunity field medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c.
Result: The formula returns TRUE if the extracted date equals the recommended Close Date, and FALSE otherwise.
formulas.name: Close_Date_Updated_On_Opp
formulas.expression: IF( CONTAINS({!Get_Opportunity.medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c}, "Your current close date is "), DATEVALUE( MID( {!Get_Opportunity.medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c}, FIND("Your current close date is ",{!Get_Opportunity.medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c}) + LEN("Your current close date is "), 10 ) ) = {!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}, FALSE )

formulas.description: to calcualte the value selected in the next satge
formulas.name: Next_Stage_Selected_Calculation

formulas.description: To get the text value of the selected stage, because of a SF bug getting the close lost\won value
formulas.name: Next_Stage_Selected_Value
NextStageProbabilityCalc
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Next_Stage_Selected_Value}, "Initial Discovery", 10, "Sales Qualified", 25, "Solution Validation", 50, "Scope Confirmation", 60, "Contracts", 80, "Prospect", 10, "Prospecting", 10, "Engagement", 25, "Proposal", 50, "Sponsor Verbal", 60, "Decision Maker Verbal", 80, "Closed Won", 100, "Closed Lost", 0, "Feature Update", 100, "Cold Opportunity", 5, "NDA", 20, "Evaluation", 30, "Mobile - Negotiations", 50, "Desktop - UFF Tech call", 50, "IO", 60, "Mobile - SDK Implementation", 80, "Desktop - UFF Development", 80, "QA", 90, "Live", 100, "SBD - Active", 100, "Not Relevant", 0, "In Progress", 20, "Awaiting Trial", 30, "Trial", 50, "Trial Completed", 50, 0 )

formulas.description: if no product is selected , a message will appear in the screen
formulas.name: Product_Missing_Validation
formulas.expression:
IF( AND( NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Advisory_Services__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Shopper__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.DMI__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Popular_Pages__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.DRI__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.II__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Data_Feeds__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.SI__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.API__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Data_ai_App_Annie__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Admetricks__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.X42matters__c})
), true,false)

formulas.description: Will show error message of no products are selected
formulas.name: Products_Selected_Validation
formulas.expression: IF( AND( NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Advisory_Services__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Shopper__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.DMI__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Popular_Pages__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.DRI__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.II__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Data_Feeds__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.SI__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.API__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Data_ai_App_Annie__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.Admetricks__c}), NOT({!Get_Opportunity.X42matters__c}) ), true, false)

formulas.name: Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict
formulas.expression: IF( TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}) = "Initial Discovery", "Initial Discovery", IF( CASE( IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_7_Paper_Process} = "🟩" ), IF( TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}) = "Contracts", "Contracts", "Scope Confirmation" ), IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} = "🟩" ), "Solution Validation", IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩" ), "Sales Qualified", "Initial Discovery" ) ) ), "Initial Discovery", 1, "Sales Qualified", 2, "Solution Validation", 3, "Scope Confirmation", 4, "Contracts", 5, 0 ) <= CASE( TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}), "Initial Discovery", 1, "Sales Qualified", 2, "Solution Validation", 3, "Scope Confirmation", 4, "Contracts", 5, 0 ), IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_7_Paper_Process} = "🟩" ), IF( TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}) = "Contracts", "Contracts", "Scope Confirmation" ), IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} = "🟩" ), "Solution Validation", IF( AND( {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩" ), "Sales Qualified", "Initial Discovery" ) ) ), TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}) ) )

formulas.name: Recommended_Close_Date
formulas.expression: IF( {!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate} >= CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 120, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 120, "Solution Validation", TODAY() + 60, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 10, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ), "Your current close date is " & TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}) & BR() & "The recommended close date is " & TEXT( CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 120, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 120, "Solution Validation", TODAY() + 60, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 10, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ) ) & " or later 🟩", "Your current close date is " & TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}) & BR() & "The recommended close date is " & TEXT( CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 120, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 120, "Solution Validation", TODAY() + 60, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 10, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ) ) & " 🟥" )

formulas.description:
MIS-6998 Stage Recommendation Logic – Documentation Purpose: This logic calculates the recommended Opportunity Stage based on a set of verdict questions (checklist-style 🟩 answers), while enforcing business constraints that prevent premature advancement.
Business Rules: Closed Lost If the current Opportunity Stage is Closed Lost, the recommendation is always Closed Lost, regardless of answers.
Closed Won If the current Stage is Closed Won and all 7 verdicts are marked as 🟩, recommend Closed Won. Otherwise, evaluate the stage based on actual coverage (a downgrade may occur).
Contracts If the current Stage is Contracts and all 7 verdicts are 🟩, recommend Contracts. Otherwise, evaluate for potential downgrade.
General Stage Evaluation Logic
Stage recommendations are based on these thresholds:
Sales Qualified: Questions 1–3 are 🟩
Solution Validation: Questions 1–6 are 🟩
Scope Confirmation: Questions 1–7 are 🟩
The formula never recommends a stage that is beyond the current one.
If not enough coverage exists to justify the current stage, a downgrade is recommended.
Examples: If current stage is Sales Qualified and only questions 1–2 are 🟩 → recommendation = Initial Discovery
If current stage is Solution Validation and all questions are 🟩 → recommendation = Solution Validation (not Scope Confirmation)
If current stage is Closed Won but only 6 questions are 🟩 → recommendation = Scope Confirmation
Technical Structure: Step 1: A Flow formula field called RecommendedStage calculates the ideal stage based on answers only
Step 2: A comparison formula checks the numeric rank of the recommended stage versus the current stage and returns the lower of the two
formulas.name: Recommended_Stage
formulas.expression: IF( CASE({!Recommended_Stage_Medpic_Questions}, "Initial Discovery", 1, "Sales Qualified", 2, "Solution Validation", 3, "Scope Confirmation", 4, "Contracts", 5, "Closed Won", 6, "Closed Lost", 7, 0 ) <= CASE(TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}), "Initial Discovery", 1, "Sales Qualified", 2, "Solution Validation", 3, "Scope Confirmation", 4, "Contracts", 5, "Closed Won", 6, "Closed Lost", 7, 0 ), {!Recommended_Stage_Medpic_Questions}, TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}) )

formulas.name: Recommended_Stage_Medpic_Questions
formulas.expression: IF( TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}) = "Closed Lost", "Closed Lost", IF( AND( TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}) = "Closed Won", {!verdict_Probability_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_probability_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_5_Economic_Buyer} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_6_Metrics} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_7_Paper_Process} = "🟩" ), "Closed Won", IF( AND( TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.StageName}) = "Contracts", {!verdict_Probability_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_probability_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_5_Economic_Buyer} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_6_Metrics} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_7_Paper_Process} = "🟩" ), "Contracts", IF( AND( {!verdict_Probability_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_probability_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_5_Economic_Buyer} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_6_Metrics} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_7_Paper_Process} = "🟩" ), "Scope Confirmation", IF( AND( {!verdict_Probability_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_probability_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_4_Decision_Process} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_5_Economic_Buyer} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_6_Metrics} = "🟩" ), "Solution Validation", IF( AND( {!verdict_Probability_1_champion} = "🟩", {!verdict_Probability_2_Identify_Pain} = "🟩", {!verdict_probability_3_Decision_Criteria} = "🟩" ), "Sales Qualified", "Initial Discovery" ) ) ) ) ) )

formulas.name: Show_All_True
formulas.expression:
IF( OR( {!Update_Stage_On_Opportunity.value} = false, {!Fields_Summary_Screen} = true, {!Next_Stage_Select_Close_Lost_Won} = {!Close_Won}, {!Next_Stage_Select_Contract} = {!Close_Won}, {!Next_Stage_Select_Sales_Qualified} = {!Close_Won}, {!Next_Stage_Select_Scope_Confirmation} = {!Close_Won}, {!Next_Stage_Select_Solution_Validation} = {!Close_Won} , {!Next_Stage_Select_Contract} = {!Contracts}),
true, false)

formulas.name: SMB_Recommended_Close_Date
formulas.expression: IF( {!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate} >= CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 40, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 28, "Solution Validation", TODAY() +14, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 3, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ), "Your current close date is " & TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}) & BR() & "The recommended close date is " & TEXT( CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 40, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 28, "Solution Validation", TODAY() +14, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 3, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ) )& " or later 🟩", "Your current close date is " & TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.CloseDate}) & BR() & "The recommended close date is " & TEXT( CASE( {!Recommend_Close_Date_Verdict}, "Initial Discovery", TODAY() + 40, "Sales Qualified", TODAY() + 28, "Solution Validation", TODAY() +14, "Scope Confirmation", TODAY() + 3, "Contracts", TODAY(), TODAY() ) ) & " 🟥" )

formulas.description: to show smb or not
formulas.name: Summary_Recommended_Close_Date
VR_Mandatory_MEDDPICC_Fields
formulas.expression: IF( AND( {!Update_Stage_On_Opportunity.value} = true, OR( AND( {!Next_Stage_Select_Sales_Qualified} = {!Sales_Qualified}, OR( ISBLANK({!Assignment_Champion1}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_Champion2}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_Identify_Pain1}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_Identify_Pain2}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_Identify_Pain3}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_DC2}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_DC1}), ISBLANK({!Get_Opportunity.Identify_Pain__c}), ISBLANK({!Get_Opportunity.Decision_Criteria__c}), ISBLANK(TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.Competition__c})), AND( ISBLANK({!Get_Opportunity.Competitor_Product__c}), OR( TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.Competition__c}) = "Evaluating a competitor", TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.Competition__c}) = "Currently using a competitor", TEXT({!Get_Opportunity.Competition__c}) = "Will replace SW with a competitor" ) ), AND( ISBLANK({!Get_Opportunity.Other_Competitors__c}), INCLUDES({!Get_Opportunity.Competitor_Product__c}, "Other") ) ) ), AND( {!Next_Stage_Select_Solution_Validation} = {!Solution_Validation}, OR( ISBLANK({!Assignment_DP2}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_DP1}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_Economic_Buyer1}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_Economic_Buyer2}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_Metrics1}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_Metrics2}), ISBLANK({!Get_Opportunity.Decision_Process__c}), ISBLANK({!Get_Opportunity.Metrics__c}) ) ), AND( {!Next_Stage_Select_Scope_Confirmation} = {!Scope_Confirmation}, OR( ISBLANK({!Assignment_Paper2}), ISBLANK({!Assignment_paper1}), ISBLANK({!Get_Opportunity.Paper_Process__c}) ) ) )), true, false )

formulas.name: VR_Mandatory_MEDPICC_Close_Won
VR_Mandatory_Stage_FIelds

Flow.label: Opportunity - sc - Next Stage MEDDPICC

recordLookups.name: Get_Opp_After_Updates_Update_Cycle_Price_Currency
recordLookups.label: Get Opp After Updates (Update Cycle Price / Currency)

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_With_Next_Stage_Stage_And_Values
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity With Next Stage Stage And Values

screens.name: Cycle_Price_can_t_be_0_error_screen
screens.label: Cycle Price can't be 0 error screen

fields.name: CyclePriceCantBe0ErrorText
fields.fieldText: Cycle Price cannot be $0 on Sales Qualified stage, please select a different cycle price before progressing a stage.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_error
fields.fieldText: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

screens.name: Get_Opp_After_Update_Error_Screen
screens.label: Get Opp After Update Error Screen

fields.name: Get_Opp_After_Update_Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
There was an error checking the opportunity after the fields updates.


Please contact MIS.

Error: {!$Flow.FaultMessage}

fields.name: meddpicc_recommend_Stage
fields.fieldText:
Recommended Stage

{!Get_Opportunity.medpic_Recommended_Stage__c}

{!Summary_Recommendation_Comparison_Stage}

fields.name: meddpicc_recommend_close_date
fields.fieldText:
Recommended Close Date

{!Get_Opportunity.medpic_Recommended_Close_Date__c}

fields.name: Error_Show_All
fields.fieldText: ⛔Do not turn off if changes were made in other stations

fields.name: Final_Table
fields.fieldText: {!Verdict_Final_Table}

fields.name: meddpicc_headline
fields.fieldText: Your responses influence the recommended probability and recommended close date

fields.name: VR_Closed_Won
fields.fieldText: All stations are mandatory to answer for Close Won:

fields.name: VR_Champion
fields.fieldText: This qualification station is mandatory to answer at this stage:

fields.name: Champion_Verdict
fields.fieldText:
"Champion" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_Probability_1_champion} Close Date: {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion}

fields.name: Champion1_Does_the_Champion_have_the_influence_to_drive_the_deal_internally
fields.fieldText: Does the Champion have the influence to drive the deal internally?

fields.name: Champion2_Champion_actively_advocating_for_your_solution_to_other_stakeholders
fields.fieldText: Is the Champion actively advocating for your solution to other stakeholders?

fields.fieldText: This qualification station is mandatory to answer at this stage:

"Identify Pain" Qualification Station

"Paper Process" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_Probability_7_Paper_Process} Close Date: {!verdict_CloseDate_7_Paper_Process}

fields.name: Paper_Process1_have_verbal_agreement_to_close_deal_from_somebody_with_authority
fields.fieldText: Do we have a verbal agreement to close the deal from somebody with the authority to make the decision?

fields.name: Paper_Process2_Legal_Procurement_and_business_owner_confirmed_no_roadblocks
fields.fieldText: Have Legal, Procurement, and the business owner confirmed that there are no roadblocks or significant obstacles when reviewing the quote or contract?

fields.name: MEDDPICC_Paper_Process_AI_Header
fields.fieldText: AI Data

fields.name: MEDDPICC_Paper_Process_AI_Display_Header
fields.fieldText: Paper Process: AI

fields.name: MEDDPICC_Paper_Process_AI
fields.fieldText: {!Get_Opportunity.Paper_Process_AI__c}

fields.name: Stage_Goal_header
fields.fieldText: Stage Goal

fields.name: Initial_Discovery
fields.fieldText:
Suspect to Prospect

  • Initial interest from cold outreach
  • Alignment of company to ICP and prospect to best fit personas

fields.name: Sales_Qualified_summary
fields.fieldText:
Need, Fit, and Priority

  • Why Similarweb? Why now?
  • Develop a shared understanding of the customer's business, their challenges, where we can add value and why it's important for them to address those challenges

fields.name: Solution_Validation_summary
fields.fieldText:
Proof of Capability

  • Confirm that our capabilities match their requirements in a way that helps them achieve their desired business outcomes.
  • Understand what steps they will take and who else is involved in making a decision to proceed

fields.name: Scope_Confirmation_Summary
fields.fieldText:
Value Confirmation / Intent to Purchase

  • Confirm the products and services the customer will need to address their challenges using Similarweb.
  • Validate alignment of cost for the proposed solution with available funding and potential ROI
  • Confirm approval to move forward with contracting steps (or intent to sign for smaller companies)
  • Document and confirm steps (who and how long) involved for customer to sign and generate a PO

fields.name: Contracting_summary
fields.fieldText:
Getting to Signature

Coordinate with deal desk as needed for final steps of negotiation and contract approval

fields.name: Closed_Won_summary
fields.fieldText:
• Celebrate win
  • Ensure hand-off steps are set-up

fields.name: Stage_Qualification_Header
fields.fieldText: Stage Qualification

fields.name: Status_Champion_Verdict
fields.fieldText:
"Champion" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_Probability_1_champion} Close Date: {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion}

fields.name: Status_Identify_Pain_Verdict_Status
fields.fieldText:
"Identify Pain" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_Probability_2_Identify_Pain} Close Date: {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain}

fields.name: Status_Decision_Criteria_Verdict
fields.fieldText:
"Decision Criteria and Competition" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_probability_3_Decision_Criteria} Close Date: {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria}

fields.name: Status_Decision_Process_Verdict
fields.fieldText:
"Decision Process" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_Probability_4_Decision_Process} Close Date: {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process}

fields.name: Status_Economic_Buyer_Verdict
fields.fieldText:
"Economic Buyer" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_Probability_5_Economic_Buyer} Close Date: {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer}

fields.name: Status_Metrics_Verdict
fields.fieldText:
"Metrics" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_Probability_6_Metrics} Close Date: 🟩

fields.name: Status_Paper_Process_Verdict
fields.fieldText:
"Paper Process" Qualification Station

Probability: {!verdict_Probability_7_Paper_Process} Close Date: {!verdict_CloseDate_7_Paper_Process}

fields.name: Stage_Exist_Criteria
fields.fieldText: Stage Exist Criteria

fields.name: exit_initial_discovery
fields.fieldText: Discovery Call Scheduled (self-source)

fields.name: exit_sales_qualified
fields.fieldText:
• Completed Discovery Call(s)
  • Mutually agreed upon needs and success criteria
  • Confirmed intent to investigate solutions

fields.name: exit_solution_validation
fields.fieldText:
• Completed Demo(s) with stakeholders
  • Customer confirmed technical alignment (Tech win)
  • Customer confirmed ball park budget matches initial pricing

fields.name: exit_scope_confirmation
fields.fieldText:
• Completed Proposal Call w/ stakeholders and EB
  • Customer stated intent to proceed with approvals
  • Customer confirms approval to move forward
  • Purchase process initiated

fields.name: exit_contracting
fields.fieldText: Ensure the customer received access and invite for hand-off

fields.name: exit_closed_won
fields.fieldText: No stage advancement, but in this stage we need to confirm the customer has received access and invite for hand-off

fields.name: medpic_updated_successfully_message
fields.fieldText:
Your choices were saved successfully


﻿

fields.name: recommended_Probabilty_Label_approval
fields.fieldText:
Recommended Stage

{!Recommended_Stage}

{!Recommendation_Comparison_Stage}

fields.name: recommended_closedate_Label_approval
fields.fieldText:
Recommended Close Date

{!Close_Date_Value_From_Autolaunche}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Choose_Step
fields.fieldText: Please choose the next stage:

screens.description: MIS-7523 Lean MEDDPICC: create a new screen for mandatory fields
screens.name: Next_Stage_Fields_Validations_Screen
screens.label: Next Stage Fields Validations Screen

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Mandatory_Fields_For_Stage9
fields.fieldText: Please fill all of the below fields to continue

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Contracts_Fields_Lable
fields.fieldText: Optional Fields

fields.name: Next_Stage_Invoice_submission_Vendor_portal
fields.fieldText: Invoice submission(Vendor portal)

fields.name: Opportunity_Closed_Error
fields.fieldText: The opportunity is closed and cannot be changed

fields.name: Product_Tracking_Text_Message
fields.fieldText: Fill all relevant products in the next screen ➡️

fields.name: Stage_Updated_messege
fields.fieldText: You have successfully moved the opportunity stage﻿

fields.name: Wrong_RT_Message
fields.fieldText: MEDDPICC is only relevant for New Sale/Upsell opportunities

subflows.name: Opportunity_AL_MEDPIC_Calculations_Opportunity_AL_MEDPIC_Calculations
subflows.label: Opportunity - AL - MEDPIC Calculations Opportunity - AL - MEDPIC Calculations

textTemplates.name: link_button
textTemplates.text: Open Record

textTemplates.name: Verdict_Final_Table
textTemplates.text:
Stage Sales Qualified Solution Validation Scope Confirmation
Qualification Phase Champion Identify Pain Decision Criteria & Competition Decision Process Economic Buyer Metrics Paper Process
Probability {!verdict_Probability_1_champion} {!verdict_Probability_2_Identify_Pain} {!verdict_probability_3_Decision_Criteria} {!verdict_Probability_4_Decision_Process} {!verdict_Probability_5_Economic_Buyer} {!verdict_Probability_6_Metrics} {!verdict_Probability_7_Paper_Process}
Close Date {!verdict_CloseDate_1_champion} {!verdict_CloseDate_2_Identify_Pain} {!verdict_CloseDate_3_Decision_Criteria} {!verdict_CloseDate_4_Decision_Process} {!verdict_CloseDate_5_EconomicBuyer} 🟩 {!verdict_CloseDate_7_Paper_Process}
Target Time 120 Days 120 Days 120 Days 60 Days 60 Days 60 Days 10 Days
SMB Time 28 Days 28 Days 28 Days 14 Days 14 Days 14 Days 3 Days
